rulings.Case Title: KAREN PURVIS VS. WELLS FARGO AND CONMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT SHEILA SANTANA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TENTATIVE RULING: GRANT MSJ. GRANT AS TO DISCRIMINATION AND WRONGFUL DISCHARGE C/A. THE FAILURE TO TRAIN AND THE WARNING ARE NOT ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT ACTIONS. D HAD GOOD CAUSE TO DISCHARGE P. P FAILS TO PRESENT SUBSTANTIAL RESPONSIVE EVIDENCE THAT DISCHARGE WAS PRETEXTUAL. UNDER Horn v. Cushman & Wakefield, (1999) 72 Cal.App.4th 798, 809, SANTANA'S COMMENTS ARE ENTITLED TO LITTLE WEIGHT B/C THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT SANTANA WAS INVOLVED IN THE DECISION-MAKING PROCESS. THE FAILURE TO PREVENT DISCRIM C/A FAILS B/C THERE IS NO EVIDENCE OF DISCRIM. GRANT AS TO BR OF K AND BR OF IMPLIED COV. P AT-WILL EMPLOYEE AND NO EVIDENCE OF GOOD CAUSE DISCHARGE COVENANT. GRANT AS TO DEFAMATION. NO EVIDENCE OF DEFAMATORY REMARK. GRANT AS TO IIED. NO OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT.(302 AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: R & R MANAGEMENT et al VS. ROBERT R MASON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice; For Judgment
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING AS TO VALAIDA MASON GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. COMPLAINT AS PRESENTLY ALLEGED DOES NOT SET FORTH BASIS FOR SETTING ASIDE DEED TO VALAIDA MASON. WHY DEED ISSUED TO MASON IF PURCHASE WAS FOR PARTNERSHIP? MISTAKE? COMPLAINT REQUIRES FURTHER ALLEGATIONS. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: R & R MANAGEMENT et al VS. ROBERT R MASON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice; Abate Action Against Deceased Robert R. Mason;
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO ABATE DENIED. PARTNERSHIP HAS POWER TO TERMINATE ITS AFFAIRS EVEN THOUGH PARTNERSHIP TERMINATED. (302/AJR/RS)
